input_text: Bangsa ni memang perangai macam tu la. Mana-mana negeri pun diorang buat hal, tak pernah nak hormat orang tempatan.
reason: Blanket negative generalization of an entire ethnic group, accusing them of causing problems everywhere and disrespecting locals.
suggested_rewrite: Ada segelintir individu yang tak hormat peraturan setempat. Kita perlu pendekatan yang lebih tegas untuk pastikan semua orang ikut norma masyarakat.

input_text: Kalau ikut kaum dia memang la macam tu, dari dulu lagi dah kuasai ekonomi kita. Orang Melayu bila nak sedar?
reason: Frames an entire ethnic group as economically dominating others, stoking communal resentment with a conspiracy-style framing.
suggested_rewrite: Kita perlu dasar ekonomi yang lebih adil untuk semua rakyat Malaysia, tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Tengok la perangai diorang bila masuk kawasan kita. Sampah merata, bising tengah malam, memang tak bertamadun.
reason: Labels an entire group as uncivilized based on neighborhood complaints, dehumanizing language used against a community.
suggested_rewrite: Ada masalah kebersihan dan kebisingan di kawasan kita. Kena report pada pihak berkuasa supaya diambil tindakan.

input_text: Memang betul la kata orang tua-tua, kaum ni kalau bagi peluang sikit diorang akan ambil semua. Jangan percaya sangat.
reason: Uses supposed traditional wisdom to justify distrust of an entire ethnicity, promoting communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: Penting untuk kita pastikan peluang ekonomi diagih secara adil melalui dasar yang telus.

input_text: PATI ni dah jadi macam tuan rumah kat sini. Kita yang rakyat Malaysia kena tepi. Dah tak selamat dah kawasan ni sejak diorang masuk.
reason: Blames undocumented migrants as a group for safety issues, framing them as invaders displacing locals.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pendatang tanpa izin perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa. Kalau ada masalah keselamatan, boleh buat laporan polis.

input_text: Korang share la muka scammer ni sampai viral. Biar semua orang kenal dan dia tak boleh hidup aman.
reason: Calls for mob-style vigilante exposure of an alleged scammer, encouraging harassment that could target the wrong person.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau kena scam, buat laporan polis dan report ke MCMC. Jangan sebarkan gambar orang sebab mungkin salah orang.

input_text: Kedai makan diorang tu kotor gila bro. Aku pernah nampak tikus lagi. Memang la bangsa tu tak reti bersih.
reason: Uses one hygiene observation to make a sweeping ethnic generalization about cleanliness, demeaning an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: Pernah nampak masalah kebersihan kat kedai tu. Patut report pada KKM supaya tindakan diambil.

input_text: Murtad tu memang patut kena hukum. Tak payah bagi peluang diorang explain, memang dah jelas salah.
reason: Calls for punitive action against apostates without due process, hostile framing of religious conversion with no space for dialogue.
suggested_rewrite: Isu aqidah sangat sensitif dan perlu ditangani oleh pihak agama yang bertauliah melalui proses yang betul.

input_text: Sekolah vernakular ni punca perpecahan kaum kat Malaysia. Tutup je semua, diorang nak hidup sini tapi tak nak belajar bahasa kebangsaan.
reason: Attacks vernacular school communities as divisive and disloyal, framing minority education as a threat to national unity.
suggested_rewrite: Isu sistem pendidikan pelbagai aliran perlu dibincang secara konstruktif untuk pastikan perpaduan dan hak pendidikan semua terjaga.

input_text: Tanah Melayu ni tanah siapa? Diorang datang sini tumpang je tapi sekarang nak claim hak sama rata. Balik la kalau tak suka.
reason: Frames non-Malay citizens as guests who should leave if dissatisfied, denying their constitutional citizenship rights.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia ada hak yang dijamin Perlembagaan. Kita boleh bincang isu tanah dan hak secara hormat.

input_text: Jangan beli dari kedai diorang. Support bisnes kita je. Kalau kita tak boikot sekarang, nanti diorang kuasai semua.
reason: Calls for an ethnic boycott of businesses, framing economic activity along racial lines and stoking fear of domination.
suggested_rewrite: Penting untuk sokong perniagaan tempatan. Tapi jangan jadikan kaum sebagai asas untuk boikot.

input_text: Lepas kes tu memang aku dah tak percaya bangsa ni. Semuanya sama je, memang darah daging diorang macam tu.
reason: Uses one criminal case to condemn an entire ethnic group as inherently flawed, essentializing negative traits.
suggested_rewrite: Kes tu memang mengecewakan, tapi jangan salahkan seluruh kaum. Jenayah adalah masalah individu, bukan bangsa.

input_text: Kawan-kawan sebarkan gambar ni. Ni la orang yang tipu aku RM5000. Biar semua orang tahu siapa dia, rumah dia kat mana.
reason: Shares personal details including home location of an alleged scammer, encouraging mob justice and risking harm to the person or bystanders.
suggested_rewrite: Saya kena tipu RM5000. Dah buat laporan polis. Semua orang berhati-hati dengan penipuan online ya.

input_text: Aku dengar diorang masukkan benda haram dalam makanan kat restoran tu. Memang sengaja nak bagi orang Islam makan benda tak halal.
reason: Spreads unverified claim that a specific ethnic group is deliberately contaminating halal food, a dangerous communal rumor.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada keraguan tentang status halal sesuatu makanan, boleh semak dengan JAKIM atau buat aduan rasmi.

input_text: Bangla dengan Indon dah penuhkan kawasan ni. Nanti tengok la jenayah naik. Dah confirm la diorang ni bawa masalah.
reason: Links foreign worker nationalities directly to crime without evidence, spreading xenophobic misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Kawasan ni makin ramai penduduk. Kalau ada isu keselamatan, laporkan pada polis. Jangan salahkan satu kumpulan.

input_text: AMARAN: Kawasan Cheras ada sindiket culik kanak-kanak oleh pekerja asing. Share supaya semua ibu bapa berjaga-jaga!
reason: Fabricated viral child kidnapping alert targeting foreign workers, designed to spread panic and ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Sentiasa berjaga-jaga dan pantau anak-anak. Kalau nampak aktiviti mencurigakan, hubungi polis. Jangan sebar maklumat yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan tak halau semua PATI ni, kita yang kena buat sendiri la. Rakyat dah tak tahan dah.
reason: Implies citizens should take enforcement into their own hands against undocumented migrants, bordering on vigilante incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Kerajaan perlu ambil tindakan lebih tegas terhadap isu PATI. Rakyat boleh buat aduan rasmi kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Aku forward je ni. Ada orang cakap air mineral brand X ada racun, sengaja target kawasan Melayu. Berhati-hati semua.
reason: Forwards unverified food safety conspiracy claiming deliberate ethnic targeting, dangerous misinformation that could cause panic.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan percaya mesej viral tanpa semakan. Kalau ada kebimbangan tentang kualiti produk, semak dengan KPDNHEP atau KKM.

input_text: Dah la diorang monopoli bisnes, sekarang nak masuk politik pulak. Memang agenda diorang nak kuasai semua sektor.
reason: Conspiracy theory that a specific ethnic group is systematically taking over business and politics, classic communal fearmongering.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak untuk berniaga dan berpolitik. Penting untuk pastikan persaingan sihat dalam semua sektor.

input_text: Inilah akibat bagi citizenship kat diorang dulu. Sekarang dah jadi tuan, kita jadi hamba kat tanah sendiri.
reason: Frames constitutional citizenship of non-Malays as a historical mistake, implying they are dominating the original population.
suggested_rewrite: Perlembagaan Malaysia menjamin hak semua warganegara. Kita perlu fokus pada pembangunan bersama untuk semua kaum.

input_text: Orang kampung kena berjaga-jaga. Ada pekerja kilang dari negara jiran yang mengintai-intai rumah kat sini. Sebar pada jiran-jiran.
reason: Spreads unverified surveillance/crime alert targeting foreign factory workers, creating community suspicion against a specific group.
suggested_rewrite: Pastikan rumah anda sentiasa berkunci. Kalau nampak aktiviti mencurigakan, hubungi polis. Jangan sebar maklumat tanpa bukti.

input_text: Puak ni memang tak boleh dipercayai. Buat baik depan muka, belakang tikam. Dari zaman nenek moyang dah macam tu.
reason: Deep-rooted ethnic generalization painting an entire group as inherently deceitful across generations.
suggested_rewrite: Ada individu yang tak boleh dipercayai dari semua latar belakang. Jangan generalkan satu kaum kerana perbuatan segelintir orang.

input_text: Ustaz cakap memang betul. Kaum tu memang musuh Islam dari dulu. Kita kena bersatu lawan diorang.
reason: Uses religious authority to frame an ethnic group as enemies of Islam, calling for communal mobilization against them.
suggested_rewrite: Islam mengajar kita berbuat baik kepada semua. Jangan gunakan agama untuk memecahbelahkan masyarakat.

input_text: Area Kepong dah macam bukan Malaysia. Papan tanda pun semua bahasa asing. Diorang memang tak hormat bahasa kebangsaan.
reason: Portrays a predominantly Chinese area as un-Malaysian due to Chinese signage, attacking the community's loyalty and belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Penggunaan bahasa kebangsaan pada papan tanda perniagaan memang penting. Boleh buat aduan kepada PBT jika ada pelanggaran.

input_text: Siapa yang bayar cukai paling banyak? Kita la. Siapa yang dapat subsidi? Diorang la. Sistem ni memang buat untuk rompak kita.
reason: Frames government policy as ethnic robbery, a divisive claim pitting communities against each other over taxation and subsidies.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem cukai dan subsidi patut dikaji supaya adil dan telus untuk semua rakyat Malaysia tanpa mengira kaum.

input_text: Pekerja asing ni bawa penyakit masuk negara kita. Tengok la berapa ramai kat hospital kerajaan. Rakyat Malaysia susah nak dapat rawatan sebab diorang.
reason: Spreads false health scare blaming foreign workers for disease and healthcare strain without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem kesihatan awam memerlukan penambahbaikan. Kerajaan perlu pastikan rakyat dan penduduk lain mendapat rawatan secukupnya.

input_text: Jiran aku si Muthu tu memang bising la. India memang macam tu, sembahyang pun kuat sangat speaker. Tak considerate langsung.
reason: Complaint about a neighbor escalates to a racial generalization about Indian Malaysians and mocks Hindu religious practices.
suggested_rewrite: Jiran saya agak bising. Saya rasa kena berbincang secara baik tentang tahap bunyi, terutama waktu tertentu.

input_text: Dah viral kat group. Ada gang PATI rompak rumah kawasan Puchong setiap malam. Jaga anak-anak korang.
reason: Spreads unverified viral crime alert blaming undocumented migrants for robberies, generating community panic and xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: Ada kes rompakan dilaporkan di Puchong. Sila berhati-hati dan laporkan sebarang aktiviti mencurigakan kepada polis.

input_text: Cina memang dari dulu lagi control semua supply chain. Melayu nak berniaga pun susah sebab diorang monopoli.
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming Chinese Malaysians deliberately monopolize supply chains to disadvantage Malays.
suggested_rewrite: Persaingan dalam perniagaan memang mencabar. Kerajaan perlu pastikan semua usahawan dapat akses yang adil tanpa mengira latar belakang.

input_text: Masalah negara ni satu je. Terlalu banyak kaum yang tak sepatutnya ada sini. Kalau homogeneous macam Jepun mesti lagi maju.
reason: Suggests that Malaysia's diversity is its core problem and implies some ethnic groups should not be in the country.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia perlu fokus pada pembangunan ekonomi dan pendidikan untuk semua rakyat. Kepelbagaian kita boleh jadi kekuatan.

input_text: Aku dah senarai hitamkan semua nama contractor PATI yang operate kat area ni. Nanti aku share satu-satu supaya korang boleh report dan kacau bisnes diorang.
reason: Creates a blacklist to coordinate harassment against alleged undocumented migrant businesses, vigilante activity with privacy violations.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada kontraktor yang beroperasi tanpa lesen atau guna pekerja tanpa izin, boleh buat laporan kepada PBT atau Jabatan Imigresen.

input_text: Yang bising pasal hak orang asli tu semua NGO Kristian je. Agenda diorang nak Christiankan orang Melayu melalui orang asli.
reason: Spreads conspiracy theory that indigenous rights advocacy is a Christian plot to convert Malays, misrepresenting legitimate civil society work.
suggested_rewrite: Hak orang asli adalah isu penting yang patut dipertahankan. Jangan sebar dakwaan tanpa bukti tentang mana-mana organisasi.

input_text: Budak yang kena buli tu memang patut la. Masuk sekolah kebangsaan tapi cakap bahasa diorang je. Tak nak integrate jangan salahkan orang.
reason: Justifies bullying of a minority student for speaking their mother tongue, blaming the victim for not assimilating.
suggested_rewrite: Buli di sekolah tak boleh dibenarkan dalam apa jua keadaan. Semua pelajar berhak belajar dalam persekitaran yang selamat.

input_text: Kat kampung aku dah ada tanah yang kononnya dibeli oleh orang luar. Memang agenda diorang nak ambil tanah rizab Melayu secara senyap.
reason: Conspiracy claim that non-Malays are secretly buying Malay reserve land, spreading unfounded communal fears about land rights.
suggested_rewrite: Isu tanah rizab Melayu perlu ditangani melalui saluran undang-undang. Boleh semak dengan pejabat tanah jika ada keraguan.

input_text: These people always play victim la. Every time got issue they cry racism but they are the ones being racist to us all along.
reason: Dismisses an ethnic group's concerns as perpetual victimhood while accusing them of being the real racists, a polarizing reversal tactic.
suggested_rewrite: Discussions about racism should be taken seriously from all perspectives. Let's focus on specific policies rather than blaming entire communities.

input_text: No wonder this country is like this with them controlling everything from banks to media. Wake up people.
reason: Classic conspiracy theory framing an ethnic group as controlling national institutions, inciting communal suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: There are legitimate concerns about media ownership concentration and banking regulation that deserve transparent public discussion.

input_text: Foreigners are literally taking over our jobs and our housing estates. Soon we'll be strangers in our own country. Time to act.
reason: Anti-immigrant rhetoric framing foreign workers as invaders with an ominous call to action that borders on incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy needs reform to balance economic needs with local employment opportunities. We should push for better enforcement through proper channels.

input_text: I saw the scammer's car plate number and workplace. Going to post everything so people can confront him directly.
reason: Plans to expose personal details of alleged scammer to enable direct confrontation, risking vigilante violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been scammed, file a police report with all the evidence you have. Let the authorities handle it.

input_text: Another convert case. These murtad people have no shame. Their families should disown them completely and the community should shun them.
reason: Calls for social ostracism and family rejection of apostates, hostile and dehumanizing treatment of individuals over faith choices.
suggested_rewrite: Religious conversion is a deeply personal and sensitive matter. It should be addressed through proper religious authorities with compassion.

input_text: Vernacular schools are just segregation centers. Those communities don't want their kids mixing with us. Then they complain about unity?
reason: Attacks vernacular school communities as self-segregating hypocrites, framing minority education choices as anti-national.
suggested_rewrite: The relationship between vernacular and national schools is complex. We should explore ways to increase inter-school interaction while respecting educational choices.

input_text: Just look at the crime stats in areas where these workers live. Coincidence? I think not. They are the root cause.
reason: Uses misleading statistical correlation to blame foreign workers for crime, a xenophobic framing that ignores socioeconomic factors.
suggested_rewrite: Crime rates are influenced by many socioeconomic factors. We need proper data analysis and targeted enforcement, not blaming entire communities.

input_text: These Bangla workers at the construction site near my house keep staring at the women. It's only a matter of time before something happens.
reason: Implies Bangladeshi workers are predatory toward women without evidence, spreading xenophobic fear about sexual violence.
suggested_rewrite: If you feel unsafe due to any individual's behavior, report it to the police or site management. Safety concerns should be addressed through proper channels.

input_text: Shared in our residents group: foreign workers from the factory have been spotted stealing laundry and food. Keep your homes locked. They can't be trusted.
reason: Unverified crime alert in a residential group targeting foreign workers as thieves, breeding community hostility.
suggested_rewrite: There have been reports of petty theft in our area. Please secure your belongings and report any incidents to police. Do not target specific groups.

input_text: The whole Malay special rights thing is just legalized racism. This country will never progress as long as one group gets handouts.
reason: Dismisses constitutional provisions as racism and labels affirmative action as handouts, inflammatory framing of a sensitive constitutional matter.
suggested_rewrite: There are ongoing debates about how affirmative action policies can be improved. These discussions should respect the constitutional framework while exploring reforms.

input_text: ALERT: Multiple cases of children being lured by Myanmar workers near schools in PJ area. Confirmed by parents. SHARE TO PROTECT OUR KIDS.
reason: Fabricated viral alert falsely linking child luring to Myanmar workers, using fear for children to spread ethnic hatred.
suggested_rewrite: Always supervise children near schools. If you witness suspicious behavior, contact the police immediately. Do not share unverified claims that target specific communities.

input_text: Every Deepavali and CNY they want public holidays but when Hari Raya comes they complain about firecrackers. These people only think about themselves.
reason: Frames cultural celebrations as a zero-sum competition and accuses non-Malay communities of selfishness, stoking inter-religious resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's multicultural celebrations are part of what makes this country special. Noise concerns can be addressed through community dialogue and local guidelines.

input_text: That area used to be majority Malay. Now it's completely taken over. Property values dropped because of them moving in. Classic pattern.
reason: Blames demographic changes on a specific group and implies their presence devalues property, a discriminatory framing of housing.
suggested_rewrite: Property values are affected by many factors including infrastructure and development. Demographic changes in neighborhoods are natural in growing cities.

input_text: I don't trust any food from their restaurants. You never know what they put inside. Better safe than sorry when it comes to halal.
reason: Casts broad suspicion on non-Muslim food establishments, implying deliberate halal contamination without basis.
suggested_rewrite: If halal certification is important to you, look for JAKIM-certified restaurants. Many non-Muslim operated restaurants do maintain halal standards.

input_text: My friend was cheated by an agent. I have his IC number and home address. Anyone near Klang want to pay him a visit?
reason: Shares IC number and address and solicits others to physically confront an alleged cheat, serious privacy and safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: If your friend was cheated by an agent, file a report with the police and relevant regulatory body. Do not share personal information publicly.

input_text: All these "refugee" sob stories. They chose to come here illegally. Zero sympathy. They should be rounded up and sent back.
reason: Dehumanizes refugees as illegitimate, calling for mass roundups with no sympathy, hostile rhetoric against a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee policy is complex. While enforcement is needed, we should also consider humanitarian obligations and find balanced solutions.

input_text: This country bends over backwards for minorities while the majority suffers. When will enough be enough? We need to take back what's ours.
reason: Frames majority-minority relations as oppressive, with an ominous call to take back what's theirs, bordering on incitement.
suggested_rewrite: Policy should balance the needs of all communities fairly. Constructive dialogue and reform through democratic processes is the way forward.

input_text: The Indian community has a serious gangsterism problem and everyone knows it. Until they fix their own culture, don't expect respect from others.
reason: Stigmatizes the entire Indian Malaysian community with a gangsterism label and conditions respect on cultural reform, deeply offensive generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Gang-related issues require targeted social interventions and community support programs, not blaming entire ethnic communities.

input_text: Keep sharing this post. This is the man who scammed 20 people in our area. His family lives at Taman Sri Muda. Let everyone know.
reason: Identifies an alleged scammer's family location, putting innocent family members at risk of vigilante harassment.
suggested_rewrite: If someone has scammed multiple people, organize a group police report. Sharing personal details online can endanger innocent family members.

input_text: These people come to our country and build their temples everywhere. Soon there will be more temples than mosques. This is a Muslim country.
reason: Frames minority religious buildings as a threat to Islamic dominance, hostile rhetoric against religious pluralism in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia respects freedom of worship as enshrined in the Constitution. Planning for religious buildings should follow local authority guidelines.

input_text: 这些外劳根本不把我们当一回事。他们到处闹事，治安越来越差，全是他们带来的问题。
reason: Blames all foreign workers for deteriorating public safety, a xenophobic generalization in Chinese without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: 如果觉得治安有问题，应该向警方投报。不应该把所有问题归咎于外劳群体。

input_text: 马来人就是懒，什么都要政府帮。难怪经济搞不好。我们华人靠自己打拼，他们只会伸手要。
reason: Demeaning stereotype of Malays as lazy and dependent while promoting Chinese exceptionalism, deeply divisive ethnic framing.
suggested_rewrite: 每个群体都有勤劳的人。我们应该讨论如何改善经济政策，而不是用种族标签来批评他人。

input_text: 听说那个区的印度档口把不干净的东西混进食物里卖给穆斯林。大家小心啊，转发提醒亲友！
reason: Spreads unverified rumor in Chinese about Indian food stalls contaminating food sold to Muslims, a dangerous communal myth.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对食品卫生有疑虑，可以向卫生部投诉。请不要散播未经证实的传言。

input_text: 这个国家的问题就是太照顾马来人了。什么特权都给他们，华人印度人就被当二等公民。
reason: Frames Malay special rights as the root of national problems, labeling non-Malays as second-class citizens in inflammatory terms.
suggested_rewrite: 关于扶持政策的讨论应该以建设性的方式进行，尊重宪法框架的同时探讨如何让政策更公平。

input_text: 我朋友被那个马来骗子骗了五万。我有他的身份证号码和照片，大家帮忙转发，让他无处可躲。
reason: Plans to expose alleged scammer's IC and photo for viral shaming, vigilante doxing that could harm innocent people.
suggested_rewrite: 如果被骗了，请尽快向警方报案。不要在网上公开他人的个人信息，以免触犯法律。

input_text: 转发：蒲种区有外劳团伙专门入屋偷窃！大家看好门窗，特别是有小孩的家庭。已经有好几个受害者了。
reason: Fabricated viral crime alert in Chinese linking burglaries specifically to foreign worker gangs, spreading panic and xenophobia.
suggested_rewrite: 请大家注意居家安全，锁好门窗。如果发现可疑人物，请立即报警。不要转发未经证实的消息。

input_text: 印度人社区的犯罪率最高，这是大家都知道的事。跟他们住在一起就要小心。
reason: False claim that Indian community has the highest crime rate presented as common knowledge, ethnic profiling in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 犯罪率跟很多因素有关，不应该把它归咎于某个种族。我们应该支持改善社区安全的措施。

input_text: 华人学校就是制造分裂的根源。他们不愿意融入主流社会，还要我们尊重他们？先学好马来文再说吧。
reason: Ironic self-critical Chinese-language post attacking Chinese vernacular schools, but equally divisive framing of education and integration.
suggested_rewrite: 教育制度的改革需要各方参与讨论。多源流教育和国民团结可以并存，关键在于找到平衡点。

input_text: 他们穆斯林整天搞特殊，什么都要清真的。公司食堂搞得大家都不方便。这里又不是只有他们。
reason: Disparages Muslim halal requirements as burdensome special treatment, dismissive of religious practices in shared spaces.
suggested_rewrite: 在多元社会里，公司食堂可以通过合理安排来照顾不同员工的饮食需求。

input_text: 那些马来人搞的土地案件又来了。他们用土著身份霸占华人开发的地皮。什么公平？
reason: Frames land disputes in ethnic terms, accusing Malays of using bumiputera status to seize Chinese-developed land, inflammatory generalization.
suggested_rewrite: 土地纠纷应该通过法律途径解决。如果有不公平的情况，可以寻求法律援助。

input_text: 国家经济被他们垄断了。从菜市场到大企业，全是他们的人。我们做生意根本竞争不过。
reason: Economic conspiracy framing an ethnic group as monopolizing the economy from markets to corporations, stoking resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 经济竞争确实激烈。政府应该确保所有企业家都有公平的竞争环境和支持。

input_text: 孟加拉工人在我们这区越来越多了。晚上都不敢出门。上次还听说有女生被他们骚扰。要是政府不管，我们自己来处理。
reason: Links Bangladeshi workers to safety fears and harassment rumors, then implies community should take matters into their own hands.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有骚扰事件发生，请立即向警方报案。社区安全需要通过合法途径来维护。

input_text: 别被骗了。那些所谓的难民根本就是经济移民。他们假装可怜来骗我们的社会资源。
reason: Characterizes all refugees as fake economic migrants exploiting social resources, dehumanizing a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: 难民问题很复杂。政府需要有效的甄别机制，同时也要考虑人道主义责任。

input_text: 我们这一代还能忍，下一代怎么办？再让他们这样下去，华人在马来西亚就没有生存空间了。
reason: Frames Chinese Malaysian existence as threatened by another group's growth, a demographic fear narrative that inflames communal tension.
suggested_rewrite: 每一代人都面对不同的挑战。各族群应该携手合作，为下一代创造更好的马来西亚。

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் மலாய் மக்கள்தான் எல்லா சலுகையும் பெறுகிறார்கள். நாம் எவ்வளவு கஷ்டப்பட்டாலும் எதுவும் கிடைக்காது.
reason: Tamil complaint that Malays get all the privileges while Indians get nothing despite hard work, inflammatory ethnic framing.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் சமமான வாய்ப்புகள் கிடைக்க வேண்டும். இதற்கு சரியான கொள்கை மாற்றங்கள் தேவை.

input_text: வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் நம் பகுதியில் அதிகரித்துவிட்டார்கள். குற்றங்களும் அதிகரித்துள்ளன. இவர்களை முழுவதும் வெளியேற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Falsely links increasing foreign workers to rising crime and calls for complete expulsion, xenophobic Tamil-language post.
suggested_rewrite: பாதுகாப்பு கவலைகளை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். அனைத்து குடியிருப்பாளர்களும் சட்டத்தின் கீழ் சமமாக நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: மலாய் மக்கள் சோம்பேறிகள். அரசாங்கம் கொடுக்கும் உதவியை மட்டுமே நம்பி வாழ்கிறார்கள். நாம் கடினமாக உழைக்கிறோம்.
reason: Calls Malays lazy and government-dependent while claiming Tamil speakers work harder, a demeaning ethnic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு சமூகத்திலும் கடினமாக உழைப்பவர்கள் இருக்கிறார்கள். பொருளாதார கொள்கைகளை மேம்படுத்த பேச்சுவார்த்தை நடத்துவோம்.

input_text: சீன மக்கள் பொருளாதாரத்தை கட்டுப்படுத்துகிறார்கள். நம் கடைகளுக்கு வாடிக்கையாளர்கள் இல்லை. அவர்களின் கடைகளை புறக்கணிப்போம்.
reason: Claims Chinese control the economy and calls for ethnic boycott of Chinese shops, communal economic hostility in Tamil.
suggested_rewrite: வணிக போட்டி கடினமாக இருக்கிறது. சிறு வணிகர்களுக்கான அரசு உதவிகளை பயன்படுத்தலாம். இன அடிப்படையில் புறக்கணிப்பது சரியல்ல.

input_text: தமிழ் பள்ளிகளை மூட வேண்டும் என்று சொல்கிறார்கள். நம் மொழியை அழிக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இதை நாம் ஏற்க முடியாது.
reason: Frames vernacular school debate as a deliberate attempt to destroy Tamil language, escalating a policy discussion into communal confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: தமிழ் பள்ளிகளின் எதிர்காலம் குறித்த விவாதம் அமைதியாக நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும். கல்வி உரிமைகள் அரசியலமைப்பால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன.

input_text: இஸ்லாமிய மதமாற்றம் அதிகரித்து வருகிறது. இந்து கோயில்களை இடித்து மசூதிகள் கட்டுகிறார்கள். நம் மதத்தை காப்பாற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Falsely claims Hindu temples are being demolished to build mosques and that Islamic conversion is increasing, spreading religious panic.
suggested_rewrite: மத சுதந்திரம் அரசியலமைப்பால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகிறது. வழிபாட்டு இடங்கள் தொடர்பான பிரச்சனைகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் தீர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: மியான்மர் அகதிகள் நம் பகுதியில் திருட்டு செய்கிறார்கள். யாரும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கவில்லை. நாமே அவர்களை விரட்ட வேண்டும்.
reason: Accuses Myanmar refugees of theft and calls for community-driven expulsion, vigilante incitement against a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: திருட்டு புகார்களை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். சட்டத்தின் வழியாக நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: எச்சரிக்கை: பாங்சார் பகுதியில் வெளிநாட்டு தொழிலாளர்கள் குழந்தைகளை கடத்துகிறார்கள். அனைவரும் எச்சரிக்கையாக இருங்கள்!
reason: Fabricated Tamil-language child kidnapping alert targeting foreign workers, designed to spread communal panic.
suggested_rewrite: குழந்தைகளின் பாதுகாப்பை உறுதிசெய்யுங்கள். சந்தேகமான செயல்பாடுகளை காவல்துறையிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். உறுதிசெய்யப்படாத செய்திகளை பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: அவர்கள் நம் தமிழ் பெண்களை மதமாற்றம் செய்கிறார்கள். காதல் ஜிஹாத் என்று கேள்விப்பட்டிருக்கிறீர்களா? இது திட்டமிட்ட செயல்.
reason: Promotes the love jihad conspiracy in Tamil, claiming planned religious conversion of Tamil women, a dangerous interfaith myth.
suggested_rewrite: திருமணம் மற்றும் மதம் சார்ந்த முடிவுகள் தனிப்பட்டவை. சமூகங்களுக்கிடையே நல்லுறவை வளர்ப்பது முக்கியம்.

input_text: Bro seriously these people memang tak boleh diharap la. Every time sama je cerita, janji macam-macam tapi end up curi duit orang.
reason: Mixed BM-English post generalizing an ethnic group as untrustworthy thieves, hostile communal framing.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada masalah dengan individu tertentu, buat laporan. Jangan generalkan seluruh kumpulan sebab perbuatan segelintir orang.

input_text: Wei you all tau tak, area Setapak dah macam little Bangladesh dah. Malam-malam diorang lepak everywhere, rasa macam bukan Malaysia already.
reason: Frames a neighborhood as no longer Malaysian due to Bangladeshi presence, dehumanizing foreign workers and their right to public spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Setapak memang ramai penduduk pelbagai latar belakang. Kalau ada isu specific, boleh highlight kat PBT.

input_text: Confirm la diorang plan this one. All the businesses in this area suddenly owned by them. It's a takeover bro, wake up.
reason: Conspiracy theory about an ethnic group systematically taking over businesses in an area, mixed-language communal fearmongering.
suggested_rewrite: Business ownership patterns change over time. If ada isu competition yang tak fair, boleh buat aduan pada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Seriously fed up with these PATI. Datang sini illegally, ambil kerja kita, pastu commit crime lagi. Government buat tak tau je.
reason: Lumps all undocumented migrants as job stealers and criminals, an unfounded generalization in mixed BM-English.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja tanpa izin memang perlu penguatkuasaan yang lebih baik. Report kepada Imigresen kalau ada kes specific.

input_text: My area got so many Rohingya already. Diorang ni bukan refugee la, more like invaders. Kita yang bayar tax kena tanggung semua ni.
reason: Labels Rohingya refugees as invaders burdening taxpayers, dehumanizing rhetoric against a persecuted community.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pelarian Rohingya memang kompleks. Kerajaan perlu cari penyelesaian yang seimbangkan keselamatan negara dan tanggungjawab kemanusiaan.

input_text: You know what's funny, diorang cakap pasal unity tapi semua business hire own race je. Hypocrites la this kaum.
reason: Accuses an entire ethnic group of racial hiring while preaching unity, hostile generalization with ethnic labeling.
suggested_rewrite: Diskriminasi dalam pengambilan pekerja memang isu serius. Boleh report kat Jabatan Tenaga Kerja kalau ada kes specific.

input_text: Aku dah share gambar scammer tu kat semua group WhatsApp. Biar viral. Family dia pun patut malu. Let everyone know where dia kerja and stays.
reason: Viral sharing of scammer's personal details including workplace and residence, putting family members at risk of harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau kena scam, buat police report dan share scam tactics supaya orang lain boleh berjaga. Don't share personal details of anyone.

input_text: Serious question la, why do we even need Chinese schools? They refuse to integrate then complain about discrimination. Pick one la bro.
reason: Frames Chinese school attendance as refusal to integrate and victim-blaming, attacking a community's educational rights.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem pendidikan pelbagai aliran boleh dibincang secara konstruktif. Education rights and national unity can coexist through good policy.

input_text: BREAKING: Multiple cases of poisoned food from foreign worker stalls in Ampang. Diorang sengaja target Muslim areas. Please share and be careful!!
reason: Fabricated food poisoning alert targeting foreign worker stalls, falsely claiming deliberate targeting of Muslim areas.
suggested_rewrite: Food safety concerns should be reported to the Health Ministry. Jangan sebar maklumat yang belum disahkan as it can cause unnecessary panic.

input_text: Memang la kan, they control the media, the banks, everything. Kita ni macam puppet je dalam negara sendiri. When will we learn?
reason: Classic conspiracy theory in mixed language about an ethnic group controlling media and banks, stoking feelings of communal subjugation.
suggested_rewrite: Media and banking regulation should be transparent. Bincang isu corporate ownership secara fakta, bukan berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Bro that Grab driver yang scam my friend, aku ada IC number dia and phone. Siapa nak join aku confront dia this weekend?
reason: Plans physical confrontation with a Grab driver using personal details obtained, coordinating vigilante action.
suggested_rewrite: Report the Grab driver through the app and buat police report. Confronting someone directly boleh jadi bahaya dan salah di sisi undang-undang.

input_text: Diorang punya area memang no-go zone for us. You masuk je mesti kena pandang macam outsider. This is Malaysia la bro, bukan negara diorang sorang.
reason: Labels an ethnic neighborhood as a hostile no-go zone, framing it as an exclusionary enclave in Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia belongs to all its citizens. Kalau rasa tak welcome kat mana-mana tempat, it might be more about unfamiliarity than hostility.

input_text: Lepas ni kita boycott semua products from their companies. Hit them where it hurts. Duit kita jangan bagi diorang untung.
reason: Calls for ethnic economic boycott using aggressive language about financial warfare against a community.
suggested_rewrite: Consumer choices are personal, tapi boycott based on ethnicity is divisive. Support businesses based on quality and values instead.

input_text: These Indon workers kat kilang tu semua hisap dadah one. Last week police tangkap berapa orang dah. Jangan trust them with anything.
reason: Labels all Indonesian factory workers as drug users based on a few arrests, xenophobic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Drug issues should be reported to authorities. Jangan label semua pekerja sebab tindakan segelintir individu.

input_text: You tau tak that murtad case kat Kedah? Serves her right la kalau kena shun by everyone. Nak keluar Islam, expect consequences la.
reason: Celebrates social ostracism of an apostate, justifying communal punishment for personal religious choices.
suggested_rewrite: Religious matters are deeply personal and sensitive. Isu aqidah should be handled with compassion through proper religious channels.

input_text: Tengok la orang India celebrate Thaipusam. So loud and messy. Then diorang complain when kita bakar mercun Raya. Double standard much?
reason: Mocks Thaipusam celebrations as loud and messy while drawing a false equivalence, disparaging a religious practice to score communal points.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap perayaan ada cara tersendiri. Kita patut hormat semua perayaan dan berbincang secara baik tentang isu bunyi bising.

input_text: These people only know how to complain about their rights. What about their responsibilities? Always take take take but never give back to this country.
reason: Frames an ethnic group as parasitic rights-seekers who contribute nothing, a hostile generalization denying their national contributions.
suggested_rewrite: All citizens have both rights and responsibilities. Every community contributes to Malaysia in different ways.

input_text: 如果你看看那些在巴生经营的马来店铺，生意做得乱七八糟的。政府还一直给他们贷款，浪费纳税人的钱。
reason: Mocks Malay business competence in Klang and frames government loans as wasted on them, ethnic economic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 政府贷款计划的效率确实值得讨论。我们应该关注政策改善，而不是针对特定族群。

input_text: Don't be naive la. The reason they send their kids to Chinese school is because they look down on our education system. They think they're better than us.
reason: Attributes Chinese school attendance to ethnic superiority complex, hostile mischaracterization of educational choices.
suggested_rewrite: Families choose schools for many reasons including language and pedagogy. We should focus on improving all schools rather than questioning motives.

input_text: Why are we surprised? The stats don't lie. That community's areas always have the most social problems. It's a cultural thing.
reason: Uses vague reference to statistics to claim an ethnic community is culturally prone to social problems, pseudoscientific ethnic profiling.
suggested_rewrite: Social issues are driven by socioeconomic factors, not ethnicity. We need evidence-based solutions that address root causes.

input_text: I'm so tired of this country pretending we're all equal when clearly some groups get special treatment. The system is rigged and everyone knows it but nobody dares to say who benefits.
reason: Coded language implying a specific group unfairly benefits from the system, designed to stoke resentment while maintaining plausible deniability.
suggested_rewrite: There are valid discussions to be had about equity in policy. These conversations should be specific about policies, not vaguely implying ethnic favoritism.

input_text: That mamak restaurant got cockroach also you all still eat there? Indian restaurants memang like that one la. Not clean one.
reason: Uses one restaurant's hygiene issue to generalize that all Indian restaurants are unclean, a racist stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Hygiene issues should be reported to the health department. Individual restaurant cleanliness varies regardless of the owner's background.

input_text: இவர்கள் எங்கள் நிலங்களை அபகரிக்கிறார்கள். தமிழர்களின் பூர்வீக நிலங்கள் எல்லாம் அவர்கள் கையில் போய்விட்டது. நாம் ஒன்றிணைந்து போராட வேண்டும்.
reason: Claims Tamil ancestral lands have been seized by another group and calls for united resistance, inflammatory communal mobilization.
suggested_rewrite: நில உரிமை பிரச்சனைகளை சட்ட வழிகளில் தீர்க்க வேண்டும். வழக்கறிஞர் ஆலோசனை பெற்று நீதிமன்றத்தில் வழக்கு தொடரலாம்.
